message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Family and Fertility Survey Germany 1988 (FFS)","url_or_doi":"https://dbk.gesis.org/dbksearch/sdesc2.asp?no=3189","justification":"German survey from the late 1980s with detailed data on partnership histories, marriage, fertility, and family formation in Germany, directly relevant to family life and marriage in that decade."},{"title":"Mikrozensus 1980: Scientific Use File – Family and Household Variables (Germany)","url_or_doi":"https://dbk.gesis.org/","justification":"The German Microcensus includes large-scale information on household composition, marital status, and family structures around 1980; it is one of the key sources for analyzing family life and marriage in Germany in the early 1980s."},{"title":"Mikrozensus 1982: Scientific Use File – Family and Household Variables (Germany)","url_or_doi":"https://dbk.gesis.org/","justification":"Provides representative data on marital status, living arrangements, and presence of children in German households in the early 1980s, allowing analysis of family patterns and marriage."},{"title":"Mikrozensus 1985: Scientific Use File – Family and Household Variables (Germany)","url_or_doi":"https://dbk.gesis.org/","justification":"Mid‑1980s German Microcensus data on households, families, and marital status, suitable for tracking changes in marriage and family life during the decade."},{"title":"Mikrozensus 1987: Scientific Use File – Family and Household Variables (Germany)","url_or_doi":"https://dbk.gesis.org/","justification":"Late‑1980s microcensus wave with detailed information on marital status, family composition, and household structure, directly relevant to understanding marriage and family life towards the end of the decade."},{"title":"German General Social Survey (ALLBUS) 1984","url_or_doi":"https://dbk.gesis.org/","justification":"ALLBUS 1984 contains socio‑demographic information including partnership and marital status, and attitudes toward family and gender roles in Germany, enabling analysis of family life and marriage in the mid‑1980s."},{"title":"German General Social Survey (ALLBUS) 1986","url_or_doi":"https://dbk.gesis.org/","justification":"Survey includes marital status, household context, and values regarding family and marriage, useful for studying social attitudes and living arrangements in Germany in the late‑mid 1980s."},{"title":"German General Social Survey (ALLBUS) 1988","url_or_doi":"https://dbk.gesis.org/","justification":"Covers marital status and family‑related attitudes in Germany close to the end of the 1980s, allowing examination of trends in marriage, family norms, and living arrangements."},{"title":"German General Social Survey (ALLBUS) 1990","url_or_doi":"https://dbk.gesis.org/","justification":"While at the very end of the 1980s period, it captures retrospective information and attitudes about family, marriage, and partnership formed during the 1980s in Germany."},{"title":"Socio‑Economic Panel (SOEP) – GESIS-SUF: Early Waves Covering the 1980s (West Germany)","url_or_doi":"https://dbk.gesis.org/","justification":"Panel data for West Germany in the 1980s including marital status histories, household composition, children, and employment, enabling longitudinal analysis of family life and marriage dynamics throughout the decade."}]}
